Implements a popup reminder for heart rate sharing with actions to dismiss or stop sharing.

# Purpose
The code defines a function [`ble_hrm_push_reminder_popup`](<#ble_hrm_push_reminder_popup>) that creates and displays a notification popup related to heart rate monitoring. This function is part of a system that interacts with a Bluetooth heart rate monitor (HRM) and alerts the user when their heart rate data has been shared with an application on their phone for an extended period. The notification warns the user about potential battery drain and offers options to either dismiss the notification or stop sharing heart rate data.

The function uses several components and services, such as `i18n` for internationalization, `rtc` for real-time clock access, and `timeline` for managing notifications. It constructs an `AttributeList` to define the content and appearance of the notification, including the message body, icon, and background color. It also sets up an `action_group` with two actions: dismissing the notification and stopping heart rate sharing. The notification is then created using `timeline_item_create_with_attributes`, added to the notification system with `notifications_add_notification`, and finally cleaned up to free resources.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `ble_hrm_reminder_popup.h`
- `drivers/rtc.h`
- `services/common/i18n/i18n.h`
- `services/normal/notifications/notifications.h`
- `services/normal/timeline/timeline.h`
- `services/normal/timeline/timeline_resources.h`
- `util/size.h`


# Functions

---
### ble\_hrm\_push\_reminder\_popup<!-- {{#callable:ble_hrm_push_reminder_popup}} -->
[View Source â†’](<../../../../../../src/fw/popups/ble_hrm/ble_hrm_reminder_popup.c#L27>)

Creates and displays a notification popup to remind the user about heart rate sharing with options to dismiss or stop sharing.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Initialize an empty `AttributeList` named `attr_list`.
    - Retrieve a localized message string using `i18n_get` and add it to `attr_list` with `AttributeIdBody`.
    - Add an icon and background color to `attr_list` using `attribute_list_add_uint32` and `attribute_list_add_uint8`.
    - Create `dismiss_action_attr_list` and `stop_action_attr_list` for the dismiss and stop sharing actions, respectively, and add localized titles to them.
    - Define a `TimelineItemActionGroup` with two actions: dismiss and stop sharing, each with its respective attribute list.
    - Create a `TimelineItem` using `timeline_item_create_with_attributes` with the current time, notification type, layout ID, `attr_list`, and `action_group`.
    - Free all internationalization resources associated with `attr_list`.
    - Destroy all attribute lists to free memory.
    - Add the created `TimelineItem` to the notifications system using `notifications_add_notification`.
    - Destroy the `TimelineItem` to free memory.
- **Output**: No output is returned as the function operates by side effects, creating and displaying a notification.
